author_rating_explanation: The first author is affiliated with the University of Pennsylvania, a top US AI school in the 8-9 band, and Tecnalia (Spain), a research center. The last author is affiliated with Universidad de Granada and the DaSCI Andalusian Institute of Data Science and Computational Intelligence in Spain, which is a recognized AI research institute in Europe. UPenn pulls the score toward the higher end, but the last author's institution is more mid-tier European, resulting in a combined score of 6.5.

author_profiles.name: Krishnamurthy Dj Dvijotham
author_profiles.affiliation: Universidad de Granada; Instituto Andaluz de Ciencias de la Tierra; DaSCI Andalusian Institute of Data Science and Computational Intelligence, University of Granada, Granada 18071, Spain; DaSCI  - Instituto Andaluz Interuniversitario en Data Science and Computational Intelligence (Spain)
